- User triggered the scheduled meeting-video archive job for Got Moles, which is designed to run locally from the Agentic OS cron host to sweep unarchived Notion meetings and pull videos from Zoom into the shared Drive folder.

- The script failed immediately with "FAILED: Zoom creds missing in .env" — exited before attempting any archival.

- Impact: 0 meetings archived, 0 Notion rows updated, backlog not cleared; however, no data was lost since no operations were attempted.
- Per the job's failure policy, the cron stops and will automatically retry on the next scheduled run once credentials are added to `.env`.
- Claude flagged this as consistent with an earlier "credential died" issue in memory for the Jobber n8n app — suggests checking whether a Zoom S2S OAuth app was ever provisioned or if one needs to be created in the Zoom marketplace.
